Published or released observation: Motion styles depend on coupling between pressure generation and drainage
How the criterion is checked: The proposed Pi and R(Pi) isolate the dissipation part of that feedback
Limit of the check: External conceptual consistency, not direct calibration

Published or released observation: Undrained tests used closed chamber water lines; naturally drained tests used open lines
How the criterion is checked: The limiting cases match the model endpoints R approximately 1 for closed drainage and lower R for open drainage
Limit of the check: A future calibration can ingest released time series

Published or released observation: Road vulnerability depends on physical response, not only hazard presence
How the criterion is checked: The retained-pressure variable supplies a transparent descriptor for road cuts, embankments and retaining-system back-slopes
Limit of the check: Supports engineering interpretation but does not replace site-specific risk modelling
